name: Asset health score
semantic_definition: Weighted score derived from current telemetry against normal operating envelopes and known degradation patterns.

name: Production throughput
semantic_definition: Synthetic well flow converted to production throughput for the offshore hub.

name: Gas export reliability
semantic_definition: Reliability proxy from compressor health, vibration, discharge pressure, and driver power.

name: Compression efficiency
semantic_definition: Proxy from discharge pressure achieved per unit driver power, penalized for vibration and bearing temperature.

name: Separator stability
semantic_definition: Proxy from separator level and pressure staying within stable operating bands.

name: Refinery utilization
semantic_definition: Crude charge pump flow as a proxy for refinery load against synthetic nameplate.

name: Energy intensity
semantic_definition: Fired heater fuel consumption normalized by crude charge flow.

name: Emissions intensity
semantic_definition: Synthetic emissions factor applied to fuel gas flow and normalized by charge flow.
